lines.english: That humble being who is imbued with the sublime essence of the Lord is certified and approved. ||7||
I see Him here and there; I dwell on Him intuitively.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਭਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: tujh bin tthaakur kisai na bhaavau |
lines.english: I do not love any other than You, O Lord and Master.
O Nanak, my ego has been burnt away by the Word of the Shabad.
The fickle consciousness cannot find the Lord's limits.
The True Guru has shown me the Blessed Vision of the True Lord. ||8||3||
Basant, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਕੋ ਕਰੈ ਨ ਸਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin preetam ko karai na saaraa |1|
lines.english: No one cares for me, except my Beloved. ||1||
I am suffering and dying, O my Creator.
It is caught in non-stop coming and going.
I have taken all sorts of medicines; I am so tired of them.
All are high and exalted; how can I call anyone low?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਪਤੀਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagatee sach naam pateenaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Devotional worship of the Lord and the True Name has satisfied me. ||1||Pause||
My Lord and Master is the Giver of pain and pleasure. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਦੁਖੁ ਚੂਕੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kiau dukh chookai bin gur mere |
lines.english: How can this disease be cured, without my Guru?
Without devotional worship of the Lord, the pain is so great.
My mind and body are filled with faults and demerits.
He knows my disease, and only He can take away the pain.
The disease is so deadly; how can I find the courage?
As You keep me, so do I remain.
I searched and searched, and found the Guru, O my brother! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਦਾਰੂ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad daaroo har naau |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad, and the Lord's Name are the cures.
The world is sick; where should I look?
He ushers the soul-bride into the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਘਰੁ ਜੋ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਿਖਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ghar meh ghar jo dekh dikhaavai |
lines.english: The Guru sees and reveals the Lord's home, deep within the home of the self;
The Lord is Pure and Immaculate; Immaculate is His Name. ||4||
such people of the Lord remain unattached. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਨੂਆ ਚਿਤ ਮਹਿ ਚੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: man meh manooaa chit meh cheetaa |
lines.english: When the mind remains in the mind, and the consciousness in the consciousness,
They remain free of any desire for happiness or sorrow;
tasting the Amrit, the Ambrosial Nectar, they abide in the Lord's Name.
They are victorious on the battlefield of life, following the Guru's Teachings, and their pains run away. ||6||
They recognize their own selves, and remain lovingly attuned to the Lord.
Of course, I have died, and now I am alive to live.
The Guru has given me the True Ambrosial Nectar; I drink it in.
One who is Yours, merges into You. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt rav rahiaa prabh jaapai |
lines.english: God appears permeating and pervading in each and every heart.
Painful diseases afflict those who are sexually promiscuous.
Please, protect me as Your Own, if it pleases You.
- O Nanak, his heart and consciousness dwell upon and savor the Lord. ||8||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਦੁਖ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਅਤੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sukh dukh hee te gur sabad ateetaa |
lines.english: One who remains unattached, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad
Do not make such a show of rubbing ashes on your body.
O naked Yogi, this is not the way of Yoga! ||1||
Basant, First Mehl, Ik-Tukee:
Consult the Guru, reflect and think it over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂੜੑੇ ਕਾਹੇ ਬਿਸਾਰਿਓ ਤੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: moorrae kaahe bisaario tai raam naam |
lines.english: You fool! How can you have forgotten the Lord's Name?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤ ਕਾਲਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਆਵੈ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ant kaal terai aavai kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: At the very last moment, it and it alone shall be of any use to you. ||1||Pause||
Wherever I look, I see the Lord of the World. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਹਉ ਆਖਾ ਜਾਂ ਕਛੂ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa hau aakhaa jaan kachhoo naeh |
lines.english: What can I say? I am nothing.
When you must leave, nothing shall go along with you. ||4||
All my status and honor are in Your Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਹੇ ਮਾਲੁ ਦਰਬੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਗਰਬਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kaahe maal darab dekh garab jaeh |
lines.english: Why do you take such pride in gazing upon your property and wealth?
Your mind is tied with the rope of egotism.
This is the basis of the way of Yoga. ||5||
So subdue the five thieves, and hold your consciousness in its place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨ ਚੇਤਹਿ ਮੂੜੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: har na cheteh moorre mukat jaeh |6|
lines.english: You do not even think of the Lord - you fool! He alone shall liberate you. ||6||
At that very last moment, you fool, you shall be beaten. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤ ਹਰਿ ਵਿਸਰਿਐ ਜਮ ਵਸਿ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: mat har visariai jam vas paeh |
lines.english: If you forget the Lord, you will fall into the clutches of the Messenger of Death.
